## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Deployment Impact

- [ ] No production deploy impact
- [ ] Requires manual deploy to `production`
- [ ] Requires env/config change
- [ ] Requires migration or data operation

## Test Plan

- [ ] Backend CI relevant and expected to pass
- [ ] Frontend CI relevant and expected to pass
- [ ] Manual verification completed

## GitHub Guardrails

- [ ] PR target is correct
- [ ] Not targeting `production` unless this is an intentional deploy PR from `main`
- [ ] No secrets, dumps, or local data paths included
